pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-006 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.418 composite (highest: DCWF at 0.418) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA addresses pipeline and ETL/ELT engineering work central to the Data Engineer role. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) at composite 0.418. Edge domain threshold is ≥0.42. Consistency check: this may fall below the applied standard.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.418 is below threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.418)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of 500+ DE job postings (2023-2025) does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard IC/senior IC requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.418 is below threshold.
